risks.message: T012 'Comply with local university data protection' blocks 5 tasks -- critical single point of failure
risks.mitigation: Split task or add a parallel implementation path

risks.message: Foundational NFR gates (T009, T010, T013, T014) collectively gate 7 downstream tasks and should be front-loaded early
risks.mitigation: Schedule foundational NFR tasks as parallel early work and validate them incrementally rather than treating each as an isolated blocker

risks.message: 7 tasks can start simultaneously -- high coordination overhead in first sprint
risks.mitigation: Assign clear task owners before sprint starts

risks.message: Total effort 372h is very high -- delivery risk
risks.mitigation: Reduce scope to MVP or extend timeline significantly

risks.message: NFR work (190h) exceeds FR work (182h) -- quality engineering dominates timeline
risks.mitigation: Consider deferring lower-priority NFR tasks to a later phase

risks.message: Dependency sequencing was inferred for some tasks -- not explicitly stated in requirements
risks.mitigation: Verify inferred dependencies with stakeholders before sprint

mitigations: [CRITICAL] Split task or add a parallel implementation path
[HIGH] Schedule foundational NFR tasks as parallel early work and validate them incrementally rather than treating each as an isolated blocker
[CRITICAL] Reduce scope to MVP or extend timeline significantly
